title: Orbit Flythrough, Reading Flow, Intrinsic Type, Paint Worklets & Shadow DOM
description: Five fresh 2026 web-platform drops: a WebGL scroll flythrough, CSS reading-flow accessible bento, container-fluid typography, Houdini paint worklets, and Declarative Shadow DOM components.

drops.title: Orbit Flythrough
drops.description: A scroll-scrubbed WebGL camera orbits and bobs through a helix of glowing gallery panels.
drops.concept: Reimplements the idea behind a scroll-driven 3D gallery camera path — instead of Three.js/GSAP and a Blender-authored path, this uses hand-rolled WebGL matrix math (lookAt/perspective) with the camera position parametrized directly by scroll fraction, so the flight loops as you scroll through the page.
drops.source: Gaspard Hedde · Codrops "Building a Scroll-Driven 3D Gallery Using a Blender Camera Path with Three.js and GSAP"

drops.title: Reading Flow Bento
drops.description: An asymmetric bento grid where CSS reading-flow re-syncs keyboard tab order to the visual layout.
drops.concept: CSS reading-flow (Chrome 137+) lets a grid's DOM order differ from its visual order while keeping tab/screen-reader navigation sane — solving a real accessibility gap in asymmetric bento layouts without JS focus management.
drops.source: "Use CSS reading-flow for logical sequential focus navigation" · Chrome for Developers & MDN

interaction.touch: tap controls; press Tab on a hardware keyboard

drops.title: Intrinsic Typography
drops.description: Headline, subhead and body text scale fluidly with container width — no breakpoints, just a scrubbed keyframe.
drops.concept: Stores each element's type scale as a @keyframes curve from 0% to 100% width, then uses a ResizeObserver to write the live container width into a custom property and a paused animation with a negative animation-delay to 'scrub' to the exact matching frame.

interaction.touch: resize the box or rotate your device

drops.title: Paint Worklet Reactive UI
drops.description: Card backgrounds painted live by CSS Houdini paint worklets that chase the cursor with grain and aurora blobs.
drops.concept: The CSS Painting API lets a JS class draw straight into background: paint(name), redrawing whenever its declared input custom properties change — here pointer position and tunable sliders drive a grain-noise painter and an aurora-blob painter in real time.
drops.source: CSS Painting API (Houdini) · MDN & web.dev "Cross-browser paint worklets"

interaction.touch: drag a finger across a card

drops.title: Declarative Shadow DOM Kit
drops.description: Three framework-free widgets built with <template shadowrootmode> — genuinely style-encapsulated, no build step.
drops.concept: Declarative Shadow DOM lets the HTML parser attach a shadow root and its styles directly from markup, with no client-side render pass. A stepper, star rating and chip group are each defined this way; a toggle demonstrates how a page-wide 'leaky' style can't reach inside them.
